stmt: Does there exist an APS with no Godelian fixpoint and with `⊬ ⊠⊤`?
Does there exist an APS in which `⊤` is not maximal and which has a Godelian fixpoint not equivalent to `⊠⊤`?
Does there exist an APS in which `⊤` is not maximal and which has a Godelian fixpoint, but in which `⊠⊤` is not equivalent to `⊠⊠⊤`?
Does there exist an APS in which `⊤` is maximal but no Godelian fixpoint exists?

Define a general class of composite operators `△` built from `□` and `⊠` in which `⊠` occurs an odd number of times, and determine what existence, uniqueness, or nonexistence phenomena for fixed points are specific to this odd-parity case.

Define a general class of composite operators `△` built from `□` and `⊠` in which `⊠` occurs an even number of times, and determine what existence, uniqueness, or nonexistence phenomena for fixed points are specific to this even-parity case.
